section.heading: Regulations

content.p: The Administrator may issue such regulations as the Administrator determines necessary to carry out the provisions of this part in accordance with its purposes.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 85–699, title III, § 396, as added Pub. L. 110–140, title XII, § 1207, Dec. 19, 2007, 121 Stat. 1783.)
